phases.name: Register ECC agents and expose Designer to a11y_architect and seo_specialist

tasks.description: Register a11y_architect and seo_specialist in ALL_SUBAGENT_NAMES in constants.ts. Add AGENT_TOOL_MAP entries and DEFAULT_MODELS entries.
tasks.acceptance: Both a11y_architect and seo_specialist appear in ALL_SUBAGENT_NAMES, AGENT_TOOL_MAP, and DEFAULT_MODELS.

tasks.description: Add a11y_architect and seo_specialist to AGENT_CATEGORY and createSwarmAgents.
tasks.acceptance: Both agents appear in AGENT_CATEGORY and are created in createSwarmAgents.

tasks.description: Modify designer.ts to add ECC DELEGATION AND OVERSIGHT section with 2 approved agents.
tasks.acceptance: DESIGNER_PROMPT contains ECC DELEGATION section with both approved agents.

tasks.description: Add task allow permission for designer in getAgentConfigs.
tasks.acceptance: Designer gets task allow. Remains subagent mode.
Test passes. Proves 2 approved agents, 0 excluded, guidance preserved.
